mapper.select:
select * from t_schedule_job where job_id in
#{jobId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_schedule_job ( job_id, bean_name, method_name, params, cron_expression, status, remark, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{jobId}, #{beanName}, #{methodName}, #{params}, #{cronExpression}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )

insert into t_schedule_job ( job_id, bean_name, method_name, params, cron_expression, status, remark, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.jobId}, #{item.beanName}, #{item.methodName}, #{item.params}, #{item.cronExpression}, #{item.status}, #{item.remark}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
mapper.delete:
delete from t_schedule_job where job_id in
#{jobId}
